title: Entity Move Through Village Behavior
description: Can only be used by Villagers. Allows the villagers to create paths around the village.

only_at_night.title: Only At Night
only_at_night.description:
If true, the mob will only move through the village during night time

Sample values:
• iron_golem: true

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• iron_golem: 3

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description:
Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this AI Goal

Sample values:
• iron_golem: 0.6
